subcodes.first_line: This Wronged One hath enjoined upon all the peoples of the world that which is commendable and hath forbidden them that which is reprehensible, by the power of God, glorified be His majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مظلوم جمیع اهل عالم را بمعروف امر نموده و از منکر نهی و از حق جل جلاله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
